{{Quote|Get out of here, no good Ewoks!|Bobog|<ref name="Hard Sell" />}}
The '''Bobog''' was a gigantic being who lived on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]].<ref name="Hard Sell" /> In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Date note">{{InsiderCite|23|Star Wars Publications Timeline|''Star Wars'' Publications Timeline}} dates the events of the [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] animated series, which include the appearance of the Bobog in "[[Hard Sell]]," to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], which corresponds to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the young [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]], [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]], [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]], and [[Latara/Legends|Latara]] went to the Bobog to trade.<ref name="Hard Sell" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Bobog first appeared in "[[Hard Sell]],"<ref name="Hard Sell" /> the eleventh episode of the animated television series [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']]. The episode was written by [[Michael Reaves]] and premiered on [[October 25]], [[1986]].<ref name="Insider 27">{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*{{Ewoks|Hard Sell}} {{1st}}
